svg.text: GEMINI LIVE AGENT CHALLENGE · LIVE AGENTS CATEGORY
3D Globe · Mic Button · Conversation Log · HUD
GTA zoom transition · Dark minimal UI
Full-duplex · audio · position · POV · transcripts · tool calls
6 languages · Per-language voice, locale, guide name, system prompt
ES · FR · DE · JA · IT · PT
① Bearing math → instant label ② Gemini Flash vision → pixel-accurate refinement
Language lock · Proactive narration · Tool calls
Optional — bearing labels work without it
Static Street View for vision snapshots
· No video streaming — text context injection instead (more reliable)
· Single registered tool only — second tool causes 1008 instability on native audio model
· Two-phase labels — bearing (instant) → Gemini Flash vision (pixel-accurate, async)
· END_SENSITIVITY_LOW VAD required — removing it causes garbled language detection
